<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="EI_ig8sMXrOgjZVoRPmS" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-158" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="440" background="#fbfaf7" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="none"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="lblProj" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="YOUR PROJECT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sess" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#0f766e;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4" value="ONE POSTGRESQL SESSION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="214" width="520" x="540" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proj" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5d665d;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="project directory
migrations/ · functions/
__test__/ · deploy.sql" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="180" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="pgmi deploy
connect · load · hand off" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="280" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="views" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="session state (pg_temp)
pgmi_source_view
pgmi_parameter_view
pgmi_plan_view" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="170" x="555" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b45309;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="deploy.sql takes control
ordering · transactions · tests" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="175" x="860" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=12;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="your database" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="175" x="860" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="proj" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="cli"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cli" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="views" value="loads source & test files
+ parameters"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="cli" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b45309;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#b45309;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.8;entryX=0.5;entryY=1" target="dep" value="runs deploy.sql — hands control"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="500" y="246" /> <mxPoint x="947" y="246" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="views" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;entryX=0;entryY=0.3" target="dep" value="queried by
deploy.sql"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="dep" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="db" value="executes the SQL it selects"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="26" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="pgmi prepares the session.
Your SQL decides the deployment." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="380" x="40" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pgicon" parent="1" style="shape=image;html=1;imageAspect=1;aspect=fixed;image=data:image/svg+xml," vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="34" x="1012" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
